LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS MICHAEL MCMENEMY AND DEBORAH MCMENEMY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGEMNT [CCP 473(B)] IS DENIED. IN THE ABSENCE OF AN ATTORNEY DECLARATION OF FAULT, THE TIME RUN FROM FEBRUARY 10, 2011 ENTRY OF DEFAULT, AND THE RELEVANT NEGLECT OF THE ATTORNEY' WHICH IS NOT EXCUSABLE. IN ANY EVENT, DEFENDANTS DID NOT ACT WITH REASONABLE DILIGENCE GIVEN NOTICE TO THEM OF THE DEFAULT ENTERED ON FEBRUARY 10, 2010. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS MICHAEL MCMENEMY AND DEBORAH MCMENEMY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED IN LIGHT OF THE NEW EVIDENCE OF MR. VAN SICKLE'S AFFIDAVIT OF FAULT. THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ARE VACATED, AND DEFENDANT'S MUST FILE THEIR PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADINGS BY JUNE 23, 2011. MR. VAN SICKLE MUST REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF'S FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,750, PAY A PENALTY TO THE COURT IN THE AMOUNT OF $500 AND PAY $500 TO THE STATE BAR CLIENT SECURITY FUND, ALL WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO GIVE MR. VAN SICKLE NOTICE OF THIS ORDER AS SOON AS IT IS SERVED ON DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER, CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

VAN SICKLE'S AFFIDAVIT OF FAULT. THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ARE VACATED, AND DEFENDANT'S MUST FILE THEIR PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADINGS BY JUNE 23, 2011. MR. VAN SICKLE MUST REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF'S FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,750, PAY A PENALTY TO THE COURT IN THE AMOUNT OF $500 AND PAY $500 TO THE STATE BAR CLIENT SECURITY FUND, ALL WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER.
